root_cause: The Stage 2 source authority stores OS files under Metablooms_OS/, but the first successful stream rebuild inserted new overlay files at ZIP root without the Metablooms_OS/ prefix.
corrective_action: Use an overlay manifest with archive_path under Metablooms_OS/ and local_path relative to the live OS root.
promotion_status: The root-mismatched rebuilt ZIP is not promoted as final authority. A corrected rebuild is required.
